sheet.div: This weekly schedule is ready for review. Your supervisor has not generated daily plans yet for this week.
This weekly schedule is ready. Use Open Daily Plans to review the generated route days and start execution.
This weekly schedule is in progress. One or more linked daily plans have already started.
This weekly schedule is done. All linked daily plans are completed.
Complete the week setup and save, then add stops or generate daily plans.

Protected finalized days:
day(s) were skipped during sync because finalized daily plans were already linked.

div.invisible: not id or display_state != 'draft' or skipped_finalized_plan_count != 0

sheet.div: Review stops, then generate daily plans when the week is ready.

div.invisible: not id or display_state != 'plans_generated' or skipped_finalized_plan_count != 0

sheet.div: This weekly schedule is ready. Use Open Daily Plans to monitor route days.

div.invisible: not id or display_state != 'in_progress' or skipped_finalized_plan_count != 0

sheet.div: This weekly schedule is in progress. Continue from Daily Route Plans.

div.invisible: not id or display_state != 'done' or skipped_finalized_plan_count != 0

sheet.div: This weekly schedule is done. All linked daily plans are completed.

page.div: This weekly schedule is editable. Adjust stops before generating daily plans.
Add or adjust weekday stops before generating daily plans. Keep each outlet only once per weekday.
This stop list is review-only. Use Daily Plans for date-level execution follow-up.
